Fuchs Elephant Charge 2019

28 September 2019 · 📍 Nankanga Hill

28 Entries
20 Completed
71% Finish rate
$139,193 Raised
10 Checkpoints
3× Gauntlet mult.

Net distance = competition distance minus penalties. Shorter net distance = better result. Gauntlet checkpoints carry a ×3 distance penalty.

Spirit of the Charge

BE Charge — for entering the first electric car in the Elephant Charge, bringing it all the way from Itally and completing 7 checkpoints.

Most Shafted

drove their car into the water at high speed and put a premature end to their charge.
